## Problem Statement

What problem would this feature solve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the idea at a high level.

## Package Scope

Which package, app, or repository area should own this work?

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternatives or tradeoffs you have already considered.

## Additional Context

Add examples, references, or prior art if helpful.
